name: Pecan Tassies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the graham cracker crumbs and sugar in a bowl.
2. Add the chopped pecans and stir until combined.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 9-inch springform pan, packing it down firmly.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
5. Let cool completely before unmolding.
